creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
For future updates, make sure to check that the port actually installs the files you think it does.  Use "make check-plist" to do so.  I'll add a command to install the man page on commit.

I've also seen that you have changed your maintainer email address.  This is fine, but I advise you to open a Bugzilla account with that address so bug reports are addressed to you.
